name: Robert Salas
summary: Former U.S. Air Force missile officer who has associated a 1967 missile shutdown with a reported UFO event.
profileStatus: Former missile officer and firsthand claimant
profileSummary: Former U.S. Air Force missile officer who has associated a 1967 missile shutdown with a reported UFO event.
background: Former U.S. Air Force missile launch officer.
inclusionNote: Included because the missile shutdown is documented and Salas has provided named public testimony. The asserted UFO connection remains disputed.
